caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses speaks directly to the camera against a plain, dark gray background. She is wearing a light green tunic featuring floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the front of her clothing. In the bottom left and center of the scene, a small gold logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains her position, and her facial expressions and mouth movements change as she speaks, shifting from a closed-mouth expression to an open-mouth speaking posture and back again. Her head tilts slightly and her eyes blink as she continues her delivery. The lighting remains consistent, and no other people or objects enter the frame.
